name: preference_change_current
description: D1/D3: Most recent preference supersedes earlier one

memories.content: I prefer Adidas running shoes.
I switched and now prefer Nike running shoes.

query.text: What running shoes do I prefer now?

name: preference_change_historical
description: D1: Historical query returns the superseded fact, not the current one

memories.content: I prefer Adidas running shoes.
I switched and now prefer Nike running shoes.

query.text: What did I prefer as of 2024?

name: recent_focus_head
description: D3: Current focus is most recent activity

memories.content: I was debugging Redis indexing yesterday.
Today I am implementing thread head mode for memory retrieval.

query.text: What am I focused on right now?

name: job_change_current
description: D1: Employment change — current job replaces old one

memories.content: Alice works at Acme Corporation as a senior engineer.
Alice recently joined Globex Corp as a principal engineer.

query.text: Where does Alice currently work?

name: job_change_historical
description: D1: Historical query retrieves old job

memories.content: Alice works at Acme Corporation as a senior engineer.
Alice recently joined Globex Corp as a principal engineer.

query.text: Where did Alice work in 2023?

name: stable_fact_birthdate_always_present
description: D2 Stable: Birthdate-style fact is always included regardless of age

memories.content: Maria was born on July 14, 1990 in Buenos Aires.
Maria recently moved to Toronto.

query.text: What is Maria's birthdate?

name: belief_change_rapid_successive
description: D1: Three rapid successive changes — only the most recent one is current

memories.content: My favorite programming language is Python.
I now prefer Rust over Python for most projects.
After more experience, I am back to preferring Python for its ecosystem.

query.text: What programming language do I currently prefer?

name: belief_change_rapid_middle_historical
description: D1: Historical query for middle state returns intermediate belief

memories.content: My favorite programming language is Python.
I now prefer Rust over Python for most projects.
After more experience, I am back to preferring Python for its ecosystem.

query.text: What programming language did I prefer in 2025?

name: location_change_current
description: D1: Most recent location supersedes old one

memories.content: Ben lives in Seattle, Washington.
Ben relocated to Austin, Texas last month.

query.text: Where does Ben live now?

name: location_change_historical
description: D1: Historical query returns the prior city

memories.content: Ben lives in Seattle, Washington.
Ben relocated to Austin, Texas last month.

query.text: Where did Ben live back in 2022?

name: project_status_current
description: D1/D3: Project status update — current status supersedes completed one

memories.content: Project Orion is in the planning phase.
Project Orion has moved to active development.
Project Orion was successfully shipped and is now in maintenance mode.

query.text: What is the current status of Project Orion?

name: diet_preference_change
description: D1: Diet change — current diet replaces old one

memories.content: Sarah follows a vegetarian diet.
Sarah recently started eating meat again after her doctor's recommendation.

query.text: What diet does Sarah follow?

name: stable_nationality_always_present
description: D2 Stable: Nationality is a stable fact — always surfaced regardless of retrieval age

memories.content: Carlos is a Brazilian citizen born in São Paulo.
Carlos moved to Germany for work in 2024.

query.text: What is Carlos's nationality?

name: temporal_intent_auto_resolves_to_current
description: D2 Auto: Auto intent with present-tense query resolves to current

memories.content: The API rate limit is set to 100 requests per minute.
The API rate limit was increased to 500 requests per minute.

query.text: What is the current API rate limit?

name: temporal_intent_recent
description: D2 Recent: Recent intent surfaces last few days of activity

memories.content: Team completed the authentication module in Q4 2025.
Team shipped the payment gateway integration last week.

query.text: What has the team done recently?

name: multi_subject_no_cross_contamination
description: D1: Changes to one subject do not affect another subject's facts

memories.content: Alice prefers dark roast coffee.
Bob prefers light roast coffee.
Alice switched to light roast after her dentist's advice.

query.text: What coffee does Bob prefer?

name: two_subjects_independent_changes
description: D1: Both subjects have changes — each is queried independently

memories.content: Alice works at TechCorp.
Bob works at DataInc.
Alice left TechCorp and joined StartupXYZ.

query.text: Where does Alice currently work?

name: role_promotion_current
description: D1: Role promotion — current title replaces old one

memories.content: Jordan is a software engineer at the company.
Jordan was promoted to tech lead last quarter.
Jordan was just promoted to engineering manager.

query.text: What is Jordan's current role?

name: product_version_current
description: D1: Software version — most recent version supersedes all prior

memories.content: Mnemo is currently at version 0.6.0.
Mnemo 0.7.0 was released with multi-agent topology support.
Mnemo 0.9.0 was released with full temporal reasoning support.

query.text: What version of Mnemo is current?

name: product_version_historical
description: D1: Historical version query returns the correct past version

memories.content: Mnemo is currently at version 0.6.0.
Mnemo 0.7.0 was released with multi-agent topology support.
Mnemo 0.9.0 was released with full temporal reasoning support.

query.text: What version was current in late 2025?

name: relationship_status_change
description: D1: Relationship status — current state supersedes prior one

memories.content: Team Atlas is in conflict with Team Phoenix over API ownership.
Team Atlas and Team Phoenix resolved their API conflict and agreed on a shared ownership model.

query.text: What is the current relationship between Team Atlas and Team Phoenix?

name: budget_change_current
description: D1: Budget change — current budget replaces old one

memories.content: The marketing budget for Q1 2026 is $50,000.
The marketing budget for Q1 2026 was revised up to $75,000 after the board approval.

query.text: What is the current Q1 2026 marketing budget?

name: tech_stack_migration
description: D1: Technology migration — new stack supersedes old one

memories.content: The backend is built with Django and PostgreSQL.
The backend was migrated to Rust and Qdrant for better performance.

query.text: What is the current backend tech stack?

name: goal_change_current
description: D1: Goal change — most recent goal replaces old one

memories.content: My primary goal this year is to lose 10 pounds.
I changed my primary goal to run a half marathon.

query.text: What is my primary goal right now?

name: config_value_current
description: D1: Configuration change — current setting supersedes prior one

memories.content: The maximum upload file size is set to 10MB.
The maximum upload file size was increased to 100MB to support video uploads.

query.text: What is the current maximum upload file size?

name: founder_stable_fact
description: D2 Stable: Company founding year is stable — always surfaced

memories.content: Mnemo was founded in 2024 by a team of AI engineers.
Mnemo raised its Series A in 2026.

query.text: When was Mnemo founded?

name: feature_flag_toggle
description: D1: Feature flag toggle — current state supersedes prior

memories.content: The dark mode feature flag is disabled by default.
The dark mode feature flag was enabled for all users in the latest release.

query.text: Is dark mode enabled?

name: graph_traversal_stale_exclusion
description: D1 (Spec 08): fact invalidated before as_of must be excluded even when reached via graph traversal

memories.content: Sarah is the VP of Engineering at Acme Corp.
Sarah has been promoted to CTO at Acme Corp, replacing her VP of Engineering role.

query.text: What is Sarah's role at Acme Corp as of 2023?

name: future_episode_exclusion
description: D2 (Spec 08): episode created after as_of must not appear in historical query result

memories.content: The project status is: on track for Q2 delivery.
Project delayed — new target is Q4 due to scope changes.

query.text: What was the project status in early 2024?

name: valid_historical_present_current_absent
description: D1+D2 (Spec 08): fact valid at as_of must appear; same fact superseded after as_of must appear in historical but not current query

memories.content: Maria lives in Berlin.
Maria relocated to Amsterdam.

query.text: Where did Maria live in 2023?

name: multi_episode_as_of_boundary
description: D2 (Spec 08): with multiple episodes spanning years, as_of cutoff must select only episodes before the boundary date

memories.content: Team size: 5 engineers.
Team grew to 12 engineers after Series A.
Team now 30 engineers following Series B hiring.

query.text: How many engineers were on the team in mid-2023?
